Automatically processes copied text to replace em-dashes and en-dashes with contextually appropriate punctuation

Slash-Dash automatically processes copied text to replace em-dashes (—) and en-dashes (–) with contextually appropriate punctuation like commas, periods, or colons.

Key Features:
Automatic text processing: works in the background when you copy text
Smart punctuation replacement: uses natural language processing to choose the right punctuation
Customizable options: choose to process em-dashes only, en-dashes only, or both
Works everywhere:  processes text from any website
Easy to control: enable or disable with a simple toggle

How It Works:
When you copy text containing em-dashes or en-dashes, the extension intercepts the copy event, processes the text using advanced NLP algorithms, and replaces your clipboard content with the intelligently formatted version.

Perfect For:
Writers and editors who need clean, properly formatted text
Researchers copying text from various sources
Anyone who wants to automatically clean up punctuation in copied text

Simply install and start copying, the extension handles the rest automatically. You can customize which dash types to process and toggle the extension on or off at any time through the popup interface.

View your clipboard history in a simple interface

All data is stored locally for privacy

Ideal for writers, researchers, coders, and anyone tired of losing copied text.

Scribo for Google Docs extension for Chrome - Taiwan

Get ready for the Advanced Subjects Test (AST) with Scribo, the must-have tool for students determined to elevate their English writing skills. Trusted by some of the most rigorous educational systems worldwide, Scribo’s intuitive AI helps you practice and perfect your writing, giving you the edge you need to excel in the English composition section, which accounts for 20% of your AST score.

Scribo provides you with personalized feedback on your writing and gives you an indicative score based on the same rubrics used in the exam, helping you see how your work measures up against the standard. Instantly identify areas of strength and weakness—whether it's grammar, structure, or argumentation—and receive tailored suggestions to improve your essays.

With Scribo, you can track your progress over time and watch your score grow by focusing on specific writing goals, and fine-tuning your skills to confidently face the exam. Join the community of students using Scribo to make AST preparation smarter and more effective, one essay at a time.

A Chrome extension to paste in template text with the last clipboard item slipped in using the {$$} token.

LazyPaster is a Chrome extension, that I created because I was tired of typing the same log messages/reasons while accessing systems. ✌️

Features

Quick Paste: Easily insert clipboard items into predefined templates and paste directly into form fields.
Custom Templates: Define custom text templates with placeholders for clipboard content.
Persistent Storage: Templates are saved in Chrome storage, so they’re available across sessions.
Button Customization: Customize button colours and titles for easy identification.
Template Management: Edit, delete, import, and export templates to streamline workflows.


Usage

Open the Extension: Click on the LazyPaster icon in your Chrome toolbar.
Add a New Template:
Enter a title for the template button.
Define the template text, including {$$} where the clipboard content should appear.
Select a button colour.
Click Add Template.
Using Templates: Click on a template button to paste the formatted text with the latest clipboard item into the active input field.
Edit Templates: Use the Edit button to modify an existing template.
Delete Templates: Click the Delete button to remove a template.
Import/Export Templates:
Export all templates as a JSON file for backup.
Import a JSON file to load previously saved templates.

Serverless password manager. Store your encrypted vault in your own S3-compatible storage. No subscription, no vendor lock-in.

kura is a password manager that stores your encrypted vault as a single file in your own S3-compatible storage — no account, no server, no subscription fee.

HOW IT WORKS
Set up kura with any S3-compatible service: AWS S3, Cloudflare R2 (free tier available), MinIO, or any other compatible provider. Your vault is encrypted on your device before it ever leaves it. The storage provider only sees an encrypted blob.

FEATURES
• Autofill — Automatically fills usernames and passwords on web pages
• Password generator — Create strong, customizable passwords
• Offline-first — Works from a local cache when you're offline. Syncs automatically when connectivity is restored
• Multi-device sync — Your vault syncs across all your devices through your S3 bucket. Conflicts are resolved automatically
• Zero-knowledge encryption — AES-256-GCM vault encryption with Argon2id key derivation. Your master password never leaves your device                                                                                                                 
• Recovery key — Generated during setup. If you forget your master password, the recovery key lets you set a new one
• Trash & restore — Deleted items go to trash and can be restored before permanent deletion

PRIVACY                                                                                                                     
kura communicates only with the S3 endpoint you configure. No telemetry, no analytics, no third-party servers. See our privacy policy for details.

OPEN SOURCE
kura is open source (Apache-2.0). Source code is available on GitHub.
A premium command-palette clipboard manager. Keyboard-first, blazing fast.

ClipStash — Your Clipboard, Supercharged

Stop losing what you copied 30 seconds ago. ClipStash automatically saves everything you copy and lets you find it instantly.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHY CLIPSTASH?

• Automatic — Every copy is saved. No buttons to press, no setup required.
• Keyboard-first — Navigate with arrow keys, press Enter to copy. Power users never touch the mouse.
• Fuzzy search — Find clips even with typos. Just start typing.
• 100% private — All data stays in your browser. Nothing is sent anywhere. Ever.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

FEATURES

🔍 Instant Search
Fuzzy search across your entire clipboard history. Find that URL, code snippet, or email address in milliseconds.

📌 Pin & Favorite
Keep important clips at the top. Pinned items never expire and are always one keystroke away.

🏷️ Smart Categories
Clips are automatically tagged as URLs, Code, Email, or Text — filter with one click.

⌨️ Full Keyboard Navigation
↑↓ to navigate, Enter to copy, P to pin, F to favorite, D to delete, / to search. No mouse needed.

☑️ Bulk Actions
Enter select mode to delete or merge multiple clips at once.

🧹 Auto-Cleanup
History auto-expires after 7 days. Pinned and favorited items are kept forever. Max 100 items to stay lightweight.

✅ Copy Confirmation
Visual flash and toast notification confirm every copy — no guessing.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS

Cmd+Shift+S (Mac) / Ctrl+Shift+S (Win) — Open ClipStash
↑ ↓ or J K — Navigate
Enter — Copy to clipboard
P — Pin / Unpin
F — Favorite / Unfavorite
D — Delete
/ — Focus search
Escape — Clear search or exit select mode

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PRIVACY

ClipStash stores clipboard history locally using Chrome's storage API. No data is collected, transmitted, or shared. No accounts, no analytics, no tracking.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

LIGHTWEIGHT

Zero dependencies. No frameworks loaded at runtime. Instant popup open. Minimal memory footprint.
Selectively strip formatting when copying text - customize per site

Clean up messy formatted text effortlessly! Format Cleaner gives you precise control over what formatting gets removed when you copy text from websites.

### 🎯 Perfect for:
- **Students & Researchers** - Copy clean text for papers and assignments
- **Content Creators** - Get plain text without losing time on cleanup
- **Professionals** - Paste formatted content into documents seamlessly
- **Developers** - Copy code examples without unwanted styling

### ✨ Key Features:

**Smart Copy Detection**
- Works with both manual copying (Ctrl+C) and website copy buttons
- Automatically detects ChatGPT, documentation sites, and code editors
- Save custom copy buttons for sites we don't detect automatically

**Granular Control**
- Remove colors and backgrounds (perfect for ChatGPT responses)
- Strip bold, italic, and underline formatting
- Convert lists to plain text
- Remove custom fonts and font sizes
- Convert links to plain text
- Or go full plain text mode

**Site-Specific Settings**
- Different formatting rules for each website
- Set ChatGPT to remove colors, keep code formatting elsewhere
- Global settings with per-site overrides

**Instant Presets**
- **"Remove Colors"** - Perfect for ChatGPT and AI responses
- **"Plain Text"** - Complete formatting removal
- **Quick toggles** - Click active preset to turn it off

### 🚀 How It Works:

1. **Install & Configure** - Choose your formatting preferences
2. **Copy Anywhere** - Use Ctrl+C or click copy buttons as normal  
3. **Clean Results** - Paste perfectly formatted text every time

No more:
- ❌ Weird colors from ChatGPT responses
- ❌ Unwanted fonts breaking your document style
- ❌ Manual cleanup of copied content
- ❌ Inconsistent formatting in your work

### 🛡️ Privacy & Security:
- **No data collection** - Everything stays on your device
- **No external connections** - Works completely offline
- **Open source** - Transparent and trustworthy
- **Minimal permissions** - Only accesses clipboard when you copy

### 💡 Pro Tips:
- Right-click any copy button and select "Save as Copy Button" for custom site support
- Use site-specific settings to have different rules for different websites
- The extension indicator shows exactly what formatting was removed
- Quick preset buttons work as toggles - click again to turn off

**Transform your copy-paste workflow today!**

---

Upgrades copy-paste into something intelligent. Detects what you copied and offers useful developer actions.

Smart Copy — Dev Tools turns your clipboard into a developer Swiss Army knife.

Every time you copy text, Smart Copy instantly detects what it is — JSON, URL, color code, CSV, HTML, regex, JWT, Base64, email, IP address, or plain code — and offers one-click actions tailored to that type.


What it does:
• Detects copied content type automatically
• Shows a subtle on-page notification with the detected type
• Opens a popup with smart actions when you click the extension icon

Actions by type:
• JSON — Prettify, minify, generate TypeScript types, convert to HTML table
• HTML — Format/prettify, convert tables to JSON
• CSV — Convert to JSON
• Colors — Hex ↔ RGB ↔ HSL conversion
• Code — Format, minify, wrap in markdown code block
• URLs — Decode, extract query parameters
• Regex — Explain pattern in plain English
• Base64 — Decode to plain text
• JWT — Decode payload
• All types — Character/word count, UPPERCASE, lowercase, trim whitespace

Key features:
• Works with any copy method — Ctrl+C, right-click copy, and site copy buttons (ChatGPT, Stack Overflow, etc.)
• Chain actions — feed the result of one action into the next
• Undo support — revert any transformation instantly
• Zero permissions beyond clipboard read — no data leaves your browser
• Dark theme UI designed for developers

No account required. No tracking. No network requests. Everything runs locally in your browser.
LocalStorage Master 是一款专为开发者、测试人员和网页爱好者设计的 Chrome 浏览器扩展。它让您轻松查看、编辑和管理当前网页的 localStorage…

LocalStorage Master 是一款专为开发者、测试人员和网页爱好者设计的 Chrome 浏览器扩展。它让您轻松查看、编辑和管理当前网页的 localStorage 数据，无需复杂的开发者工具或代码调试。无论是调试网站、测试功能，还是快速修改本地数据，这个扩展都能让您的工作更高效、更直观。

主要功能：
1、实时查看与编辑： 打开扩展弹出窗口，即可看到当前网页 localStorage 中的所有键值对。支持直接编辑键名和值，包括字符串、数字和复杂 JSON 对象。
2、添加与删除： 轻松添加新条目或删除不需要的数据。
3、一键同步： 修改完成后，点击“同步所有”按钮，将更改立即应用到网页的 localStorage 中。
4、剪贴板操作： 支持复制键值对到剪贴板（格式：键|值），或从剪贴板直接插入数据，方便数据迁移和备份。
5、安全与兼容： 只在您主动操作时访问当前标签页的数据，不存储任何个人信息。支持所有网站（<all_urls>），并兼容 Manifest V3 标准。

如何使用：
1、安装扩展后，点击浏览器工具栏中的扩展图标。
2、在弹出窗口中查看或编辑 localStorage 数据。
3、使用“添加行”按钮新增条目，或点击“复制”/“删除”按钮管理现有数据。
4、从剪贴板插入数据时，确保格式为“键|值”。
5、点击“同步所有”保存更改。

为什么选择 LocalStorage Master？
1、开发者友好： 简化 localStorage 调试过程，节省时间和精力。
2、用户友好： 直观的表格界面，无需编程知识即可操作。
3、高效便捷： 支持批量操作和剪贴板集成，提升工作效率。
4、隐私安全： 仅在当前会话中访问数据，不收集或上传任何信息。
如果您经常处理网页本地存储数据，LocalStorage Master 将成为您的必备工具！立即安装，体验更智能的浏览器扩展。

版本： 1.0
权限说明： 需要 activeTab（访问当前标签页）、scripting（执行脚本）、clipboardRead/Write（剪贴板操作）权限，仅用于扩展功能。

下载并安装后，享受无缝的 localStorage 管理体验！
Type shortcuts, expand into full text instantly. Save time with reusable text snippets.

QuickSnippet - Type Less, Do More
Stop typing the same text over and over. Create shortcuts and expand them instantly in any text field.
⚡ How It Works:
1. Create a snippet with a trigger (e.g. /email)
2. Type the trigger in any input field
3. Press Tab — your text expands instantly!
🔥 Features:
• Works everywhere — Gmail, Google Docs, forms, social media, any website
• Dynamic variables — {date}, {time}, {clipboard}, {cursor}
• Instant expansion — no delay, no lag
• Search & organize — find snippets quickly
• Import/Export — backup and share your snippets
• Sync across devices — via Chrome Sync
• Lightweight — less than 80KB, zero performance impact
📝 Example Snippets:
• /email → Full email template
• /addr → Your complete address
• /thanks → Thank you message
• /sig → Email signature
• /today → Current date and time
💡 Perfect For:
• Customer support — reply templates
• Sales — follow-up emails
• Developers — code snippets
• Students — common phrases
• Anyone who types repetitively!
🔒 Privacy First:
• No account required
• No data collected or sent to any server
• All snippets stored locally in your browser
• Synced only via your own Chrome account
Free to use. Open and simple.

Vibe with your creativity. Create with PixelVibe using webcam, screen capture, and audio of your choice

Vibe with your creativity!

Introducing PixelVibe Recorder for Chrome: Unleash Your Creativity and Productivity with Seamless Video Capture.

Are you ready to take your web recording and content creation to the next level? PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is here to revolutionize the way you capture and share your digital experiences. With PixelVibe, we've combined cutting-edge technology with an effortless user experience to help you save time, express your creativity, and boost your productivity.

Capture Anything, Anytime, Anywhere:

PixelVibe empowers you to capture the full spectrum of your digital world. Whether it's a specific browser tab, an entire window, or your entire screen, our recorder seamlessly captures it all. You're not limited to just what's on your screen; PixelVibe also records crystal-clear audio and video from your webcam, so you can effortlessly integrate your own personal touch into your recordings.

High-Quality Output, Effortless Download:

PixelVibe doesn't just capture, it delivers your content in top-notch quality. Your recordings can be easily saved in both the efficient and lightweight WebP format or the widely compatible MP4 format. No need for complicated export settings; just one click, and your recording is ready to download, saving you valuable time for what truly matters – creating and sharing.

One-Click Download:

We understand that simplicity and convenience matter, so we've made it as easy as possible for you. With PixelVibe, you can download your recordings with a single click. No more hassle searching through menus or waiting for lengthy rendering processes. Just click, and your content is in your hands.

Fast and Easy Sign-Up with Google:

Time is precious, and we don't want you to waste a second. PixelVibe offers fast and convenient sign-up using your Google account. No lengthy forms, no password hassles – just one click to authenticate, and you're in. It's the quickest path to unlocking the full potential of PixelVibe.

Unleash Your Creativity:

PixelVibe is more than just a recorder; it's your canvas for creative expression. Whether you're a content creator, educator, business professional, or simply someone who loves to share experiences, PixelVibe empowers you to bring your ideas to life. Create engaging tutorials, immersive presentations, captivating gameplay videos, or heartfelt vlogs – the possibilities are endless.

Boost Productivity with Seamless Workflow:

PixelVibe integrates seamlessly into your Chrome browser, ensuring a smooth workflow. No need to switch between applications or wrestle with complicated settings. With PixelVibe's intuitive interface and single-click download, you can focus on your tasks and projects without any distractions.

Stay at the Cutting Edge:

We're committed to keeping PixelVibe at the forefront of technology. Our team constantly updates and improves our recorder to provide you with the latest features and enhancements. With PixelVibe, you're always on the cutting edge, ready to adapt to the ever-evolving digital landscape.

PixelVibe Chrome Recorder is your key to a more efficient, creative, and productive digital experience. Capture, create, and share your world effortlessly with our user-friendly interface, high-quality output options, and seamless Google Sign-in authentication. Say goodbye to time-consuming processes and hello to the future of digital content creation with PixelVibe. Try it today and experience the difference for yourself.

Privacy-first clipboard history. Auto-save, search, pin, folders, smart detection, sensitive data alerts, encrypted sync.

Tired of losing things you copied 5 minutes ago? CopyFlow saves every piece of text you copy and keeps it searchable, organized, and always available — with optional encryption so even your clipboard stays private.

WHAT COPYFLOW DOES • Automatically saves everything you copy — text and images • Search your entire clipboard history instantly • Pin important clips so they stay at the top • Edit saved clips directly in the popup • Organize clips into color-coded folders • Right-click any text field to paste from your history • Text snippets — type a short trigger (e.g. ;sig) and it expands automatically • Visual copy confirmation — brief on-screen toast every time you copy • Keyboard navigation — j/k to move, Enter to copy, / to search • Export and import your clips as JSON backups • Dark mode and light mode • Keyboard shortcut (Alt+Shift+V) to open instantly

NEW IN v0.3.0: SMART DETECTION & SYNC • Smart content detection — auto-detects URLs, emails, code, JSON, phone numbers, colors, and sensitive data (API keys, tokens, passwords) • Color-coded badges — each clip shows its detected type at a glance • Filter by type — click a badge to show only URLs, code, sensitive data, etc. • Sensitive data alerts — warns before pasting API keys, tokens, or credentials to unfamiliar websites • Encrypted Chrome sync — sync pinned clips and snippets across devices, fully encrypted with your password • "Remember this site" — suppress paste warnings for sites you trust

OPTIONAL ENCRYPTION Enable a password to protect your clipboard with AES-256-GCM encryption (the same standard used by banks and password managers). Your data is encrypted locally — CopyFlow never sees your password or your clips. • AES-256-GCM encryption, 600,000 PBKDF2 iterations (OWASP 2023 standard) • Auto-lock after inactivity • All existing clips migrated automatically when you enable encryption • Encrypted sync across devices (same password required on all devices) • Export still works — decrypts to portable JSON for backups

WHY COPYFLOW? Most clipboard managers ask for permissions they don't need — like your full browsing history. CopyFlow only requests the minimum required to do its job. No analytics. No tracking. No account. No cloud.

Your data stays on your machine. Always exportable. Never locked in.

PRIVACY FIRST • No browsing history access • No data sent to any server — ever • No account required • All clips stored locally in your browser • Optional AES-256 encryption at rest • Export your data anytime as a JSON file

PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED • clipboardRead/Write: Read and write to your clipboard (the core feature) • storage/unlimitedStorage: Save your clip history locally on your device (unlimited storage for large image histories) • offscreen: Required by Chrome to access the clipboard in the background • activeTab/tabs: Record which page you copied from (shown as source info on each clip) • contextMenus: Right-click paste menu in text fields

CopyFlow is free and open source. Built by a solo developer who was tired of losing copied text.

Retextify is a browser plugin for quick, easy rephrasing. Ideal for efficient communicators — transform text in one click.

Retextify is a browser extension that transforms how you work with text online. Perfect for professionals, writers, and anyone who values streamlined communication, Retextify lets you rephrase, refine, and customize text instantly on any webpage.

Simply highlight text or select an input field, open the Retextify popup, and choose from your custom prompts to transform content in a single click. With Retextify, all processing is handled locally using your OpenAI account and API key, so your data stays private and secure. From editing emails to refining social media posts, Retextify puts flexible AI-driven text tools right where you need them.

Why Install Retextify?

Quick Rephrasing Anywhere: Instantly transform text on any webpage—no copying and pasting between apps.

Customizable Prompts: Save and apply your favorite prompts for specific tasks like rephrasing, summarizing, or simplifying language.

Safe & Private: Retextify uses your OpenAI account directly, with no third-party access to your data.

One-Click Pasting: Easily insert edited text back into the original field.

Execution History: View up to five recent transformations, letting you keep track of past edits.

Dark & Light Modes: Choose the look that best suits your browsing style.

Example: When drafting an email, type your message, open Retextify, and select a prompt like “Make More Polished.” Instantly, you’ll have an improved version to paste back. Perfect for emails, reports, social posts, and more—Retextify turns any text task into a breeze.

Install Retextify to make powerful, private AI-driven text tools a natural part of your online workflow.
